innateAbility.name: Stone Remnant
innateAbility.description: Call a Stone Remnant to the target location. Stone Remnants have no vision and are invulnerable, and interacts with all Earth Spirit's abilities.The ability passively grants Kaolin attack damage bonus per unused charge.

abilities.name: Boulder Smash
abilities.description: Kicks the target enemy or allied unit, sending them in the direction Kaolin is facing.The traveling unit damages all enemy units it hits.

abilities.name: Rolling Boulder
abilities.description: After a slight delay, Kaolin gathers himself and rolls to the point-targeted location.Being disabled during the effect delay interrupts the ability cast.

abilities.name: Geomagnetic Grip
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted allied unit toward Kaolin.Silences other enemy units hit by the pulled allied unit.

abilities.name: Enchant Remnant
abilities.description: Temporarily enchants a hero, granting them the properties of a Stone Remnant.After a short duration the remnant shatters, releasing the hero and damaging nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Magnetize
abilities.description: Applies a Magnetize damage per interval debuff to all enemy heroes within the proximity radius.

talents.left: x1.75 Rolling Boulder Strength to Damage
